seoTitle: Reefton vs Research — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Reefton and Research. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Reefton and Research.
heading: Reefton vs Research — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Reefton, Victoria and Research, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Research has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Reefton (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Reefton or Research safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Reefton has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Research scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Reefton scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Research scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Reefton or Research?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Research has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
